LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: AFTER THE HEARING, THE COURT RULED ON OTHER PARTY (PARTITION REFEREE) AMY HARRINGTON'S HEARING ON REFEREE'S REPORT OF SALE AND MOTION FOR CONFIRMATION OF SALE OF REAL PROPERTY PURSUANT STIPULATION AS FOLLOWS: THE COURT CONFIRMED THE SALE TO HUI ZHEN LIANG IN THE AMOUNT OF $780,000.00. THE PREVIOUS SALE PRICE WAS VACATED. MS. LIANG IS TO SUBMIT A CASHIER'S CHECK FOR 10% OF THE PURCHASE PRICE TO THE REFEREE BY 5 PM TODAY. PARTIES TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER OF CONFIRMATION OF SALE. THE HEARING IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 22, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO ADDRESS THE ISSUES DISCUSSED TODAY. PARTIES MAY FILE DOCUMENTS AND DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF SUCH DOCUMENTS TO DEPT. 302 NO LATER THAN 5 DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.

Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Off Calendar Mar-06-2013 Granted Per Written Order

Notice Of Motion Referee'S Report Of Sale And Motion For Confirmation Of Sale Of Real Property Pursuant Stipulation
Off Calendar Feb-22-2013 Continued To Mar-06-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
AMY HARRINGTON'S Motion of Referee's Report Of Sale And Motion For Confirmation Of Sale Of Real Property Pursuant Stipulation is continued on the court's own motion to March 6, 2013 to give Defendant Martha Leonard the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Ms. Leonard must deliver courtesy copies of her opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than February 22, 2013 at 4:00 pm. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)

Notice Of Motion Referee'S Report Of Sale And Motion For Confirmation Of Sale Of Real Property Pursuant Stipulation
Off Calendar Jan-25-2013 Continued To Feb-22-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kavita Sharma, Esq. of Steven Adair MacDonald & Associates, Tel. 415.956.6488 x-22, for plaintiff;
Gordon Y. Yamamoto, Esq. of the Law Offices of Gordon Yamamoto, Tel. 415.434.4700, for referee Amy Harrington, also present in court;
John Buessenecher, Esq., Tel. 415.392.3374, for Holly Wong.

Judge Miller made a disclosure that she knows the referee Amy Harrington, whose husband is a judge. She does not believe that this fact can affect her ability to be fair and impartial in this case. No objections were raised. The matter was discussed. The court conducted an overbid hearing/auction on the sale of the improved real estate property located at 522 8th Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94118. Three parties represented by their agents placed competing bids on the property. Hui Zhen Liang through her agent John Zhou offered the highest winning bid of $780,000.00. Costs, commissions, attorneys fees, etc. were not determined at this time.

RULING: After the hearing, the court ruled on OTHER PARTY (PARTITION REFEREE) AMY HARRINGTON's Hearing on Referee'S Report Of Sale And Motion For Confirmation Of Sale Of Real Property Pursuant Stipulation as follows: The court confirmed the sale to Hui Zhen Liang in the amount of $780,000.00. The previous sale price was vacated. Ms. Liang is to submit a cashier's check for 10% of the purchase price to the referee by 5 pm today. Parties to submit a proposed order of confirmation of sale. The hearing is continued to February 22, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to address the issues discussed today. Parties may file documents and deliver courtesy copies of such documents to Dept. 302 no later than 5 days before the hearing. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

MINI MINUTES:

Gordon Yamamoto, Esq., Law Office, 415-434-4700, for Referee and moving party Amy Harrington

No other Appearance. Tentative Ruling is adopted.
REFEREE AMY HARRINGTON'S Motion For Issuance Of Orders (in re: Referee) is Granted. No opposition filed.
